---
name: "Documentation guide"
about: "Propose or draft a documentation guide / tutorial for the project"
title: "Documentation guide: [short summary]"
labels: documentation, guide
---

<!-- Please fill out this template to propose a new documentation guide or tutorial. Provide as much detail as possible to help reviewers assess scope and effort. -->

## Summary
A short description of the guide or tutorial you propose.

- Area (product/feature):
- Target audience (beginner/intermediate/advanced):

## Scope
What will be included in the guide (and what will not)?

## Requirements
Any prerequisites, setup steps, versions, or components the reader must have.

## Files to update / locations
Which documentation pages, folders, or code examples should be updated/created?

## Links / references
Include links to related issues, PRs, external docs, or design notes.

## Additional context
Screenshots, sample configs, or other helpful attachments.
